title: (Optional, funded) Bulk OA extraction with budget cap
context: Optional funded-lane acceleration: metered bulk extraction of open-access ES outcome studies against donor escrow with a hard per-task budget cap. Must never exceed the escrow; all records still pass the same compliance and CI gates. The fundedBudgetUsd value here is a placeholder cap to be set by escrow at activation. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Run metered bulk OA extraction of ES outcome studies against a hard budget cap, producing schema-valid, fully sourced records that pass all CI gates without exceeding escrow.
acceptanceCriteria: Bulk OA extraction stays within the hard fundedBudgetUsd cap; spend is metered and never exceeds escrow.
Every record is aggregate-only, license-cleared, provenance-complete, and passes all CI gates.
A public cost ledger records spend against the budget cap.
output: /output/datasets/bulk-oa/ schema-valid records plus a public cost ledger, committed to the repo.
